_description: Inference-time preprocessing for the attention_fusion posture classifier. The model takes three separate inputs — depth, RGB, and joint — each preprocessed independently. These values must match what the model was trained on.

rgb._imagenet_note: Despite using an ImageNet-pretrained ResNet18 backbone, the encoder was trained without ImageNet mean/std normalization. Do NOT add it at inference.

joint._description: 14 body joints flattened to a 42-D vector. Source data: a (3, 14, n_frames) array of (x_pixel, y_pixel, occlusion) per joint per frame. Per-frame preprocessing: x = x_pixel / image_width, y = y_pixel / image_height, occlusion kept as-is.

forward_signature._description: model(depth_x, rgb_x, joint_x) — note the argument order: depth FIRST, then rgb, then joint.
forward_signature.returns: (batch, 3) raw logits — apply softmax for probabilities, argmax for class index
